name: Starlight Fox
description: A compact violet fox with a bright starry tail.

states.name: idle
states.motion: Breathes softly and lets the tail sparkle.
Raises its ears and looks toward the task.

states.name: tool
states.motion: Paws move while the tail emits short pulses.
Pauses with one ear tilted toward the user.

states.name: review
states.motion: Turns slightly and presents the result.
Nods once with a bright star burst.

states.name: failed
states.motion: Lowers its ears and dims the tail glow.
